---
title: "CDAT 4001 тАФ Data Science"
---

Course site under construction. Lessons appear here, grouped by unit, as they are
published through the authoring workflow.

| Unit | Module | Status |
|------|--------|--------|
| I тАФ Introduction | `u01_introduction` | pending |
| II тАФ Big Data | `u02_big_data` | pending |
| III тАФ EDA | `u03_eda` | pending |
| IV тАФ Data Mining | `u04_data_mining` | pending |
| V тАФ Visualization | `u05_visualization` | pending |
| VI тАФ Recommender Systems | `u06_recommender_systems` | pending |
| VII тАФ Social Networks | `u07_social_networks` | pending |
| VIII тАФ Governance | `u08_governance` | pending |
